ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "created_at" REAL /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favourites or likes the post has received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets or shares the post has received */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Categorized sentiment of the post */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Numeric polarity score indicating the sentiment's strength */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social media post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_sentiment FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the social media platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sentiment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent theme (for hierarchical themes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_themes" (
  "post_theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-theme association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_themes_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_themes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_accounts" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the client */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the client account (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the client account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-interest association */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_accounts ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interests_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, published, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_accounts ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail within a report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post included in the report */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score for the post */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the post */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment category */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report detail was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analytics_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date for the prediction */,
  "predicted_sentiment" TEXT /* Predicted sentiment trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (pending, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of data used in predictions */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the post in the prediction model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)
